— A Letter Just For Harshada —

Words From My Heart

💖   💕   💗   💓   💞

Harshada, jab bhi teri aankhon mein dekhta hoon, toh lagta hai ki ye duniya sirf hamare liye bani hai. 🌟

Teri muskaan meri subah ko roshin karti hai, aur teri yaad raat ko meetha banati hai. 💫

Main chahta hoon ki tu hamesha khush rahe — aaj bhi, kal bhi, aur har janam mein bhi. I love you Harshada, forever. ❤️

— Our Love Story Path —

Journey Together 💕

Every step on this path is a memory I cherish ✨

✨ Chapter I
First Meet 💕

The universe paused when our eyes met for the first time. That one moment rewrote my entire story, Harshada.

💕
📱
✨ Chapter II
First Chat 📱

Words became hours, hours became days. Neither of us wanted to stop. That's when I knew you were different.

✨ Chapter III
First Smile 😊

Harshada's smile — the one that became my favourite sight in this entire universe. It still takes my breath away.

😊
❤️
✨ Forever
Forever with Harshada ❤️

Not a chapter but a promise. Every heartbeat, every sunrise, every tomorrow — together, forever, always.

❤️

For You, My Bayko 💖

pillu , you are my happiness ❤️ — Tumse milke lagta hai ki duniya mein sab kuch perfect hai. 🌸

Tum mere liye sirf ek insaan nahi ho — tum meri strength, meri peace, meri reason ho. 💕

Aaj tumhara birthday hai, aur main yeh jaanna chahta hoon — Harshada, tum meri sabse pyaari khushi ho. Forever. ❤️

❤️

Happy Birthday
Shonya 💖

I Love You Forever 💕

Every birthday of yours is a reminder that I am the luckiest person alive, Harshada. You turn every ordinary moment into something magical. You are my home, my heart, my everything. Today and always — forever yours. ❤️
